name: Golden Triangle Tour with Kerala
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Cochin, Munnar, Alleppey with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

seo.title: Golden Triangle Tour with Kerala | Mother India Tour Travels
seo.description: Book Golden Triangle Tour with Kerala with Mother India Tour Travels. Best deals on Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Cochin, Munnar, Alleppey tour packages. Includes hotels, transport & guide.
